summary: Phase 5A-bis blocked: MCS-decided atom pattern fails for pathological MCS where G(not q) is in M for all atoms q. No consistent seed exists for such MCS. Detailed analysis in code comments and report.

artifacts.summary: Mathematical analysis of pathological MCS blocker with options

partial_progress.details: Proved mcs_decides_atom, attempted Gneg_seed_consistent but discovered fundamental flaw.
work_completed: theorem mcs_decides_atom: proven (trivial application of SetMaximalConsistent.negation_complete)
theorem Gneg_seed_consistent: Case 2 (G(not p) in L) has sorry - pattern fails for pathological MCS
Detailed mathematical analysis embedded in code comments
partial_progress.blocking_issue: The seed g_content(M) U {G(not p)} can be inconsistent when G(F(p)) in M. For pathological MCS where G(not q) in M for ALL atoms q, the derivable implication G(not q) -> G(not G(q)) ensures no atom provides a consistent seed.

verification.notes: Build passes. One sorry in Gneg_seed_consistent at blocking point. One axiom (canonicalR_irreflexive_axiom) remains from original codebase.

review_reason: Mathematical blocker discovered: Plan v7 MCS-decided atom pattern has fundamental flaw for pathological MCS. See reports/30_mcs-decided-blocker-analysis.md for detailed analysis and 4 options for resolution.
